home.title: Stay Safe Today
home.noActiveDisasters: No active disasters in your area
home.noAlertsDesc: You're safe! We'll notify you of any disasters.
home.alertsNearby: You will get instant alerts if any new risk appears nearby.

alertDetail.title: Alert Details
alertDetail.action1: Stay calm and assess your surroundings

alertHistory.title: Alert History
alertHistory.noHistoryDesc: Your responses to alerts will appear here

emergency.action1: Stay calm and assess your surroundings

precautions.drop_cover_hold: Drop to your hands and knees. Cover your head and neck.
precautions.hold_on: Hold on to your shelter until the shaking stops.
precautions.glass_furniture: Stay away from glass, windows, and heavy furniture.
precautions.open_area: If outdoors, move to an open area away from buildings.
precautions.immediate_shelter: IMMEDIATE SHELTER: Drop, Cover, and Hold on NOW.
precautions.tall_structures: Extreme shaking imminent; stay away from all tall structures.
precautions.shut_utilities: Shut off gas and electricity if you can do so instantly.
precautions.major_aftershocks: Major aftershocks highly likely; do not enter buildings.
precautions.secure_appliances: Secure heavy appliances and move away from large windows.
precautions.safe_interior: Identify a safe interior spot away from falling objects.
precautions.go_bag: Keep your emergency "Go-Bag" within arm's reach.
precautions.broadcast_inst: Stay alert for local emergency broadcast instructions.
precautions.walk_drive_flood: Do not walk or drive through flood waters.
precautions.turn_off_switches: Turn off utilities at the main switches if safe to do so.
precautions.kit_ready: Keep an emergency kit with food and water ready.
precautions.evac_flash_flood: EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY: Flash flood risk is extreme.
precautions.highest_possible: Move to the highest possible ground or building level.
precautions.abandon_vehicles: Abandon vehicles if water begins to surround them.
precautions.electrical_wet: Do not touch electrical equipment if you are wet or in water.
precautions.pack_essentials: Prepare for immediate evacuation; pack essentials.
precautions.upper_floors: Move valuable items to upper floors or high shelves.
precautions.monitor_levels: Monitor local water levels and weather stations closely.
precautions.indoors_windows: Stay indoors and keep away from windows.
precautions.doors_secure: Ensure all doors and windows are securely closed.
precautions.weather_updates: Listen to weather updates and local news.
precautions.power_banks: Keep emergency lights and power banks charged.
precautions.strongest_part: EXTREME DANGER: Stay in the strongest part of your home.
precautions.glass_doors: Stay away from all glass windows and sliding doors.
precautions.protect_head: If the building begins to fail, protect your head with cushions.
precautions.eye_storm: DO NOT go outside during the "eye" of the storm.
precautions.board_up: Board up windows or close heavy curtains/shutters.
precautions.outdoor_furniture: Bring in or secure outdoor furniture and projectiles.
precautions.charge_devices: Charge all communication devices and medical equipment.
precautions.cyclone_shelter: Identify your nearest official cyclone shelter.
precautions.inland_high: Move inland or to high ground immediately.
precautions.shore_wave: Do not stay near the shore to watch the wave.
precautions.official_orders: Follow evacuation orders from local authorities.
precautions.radio_info: Stay tuned to the radio for official information.
precautions.tsunami_move_now: MOVE TO HIGH GROUND NOW: Tsunami wave arrival imminent.
precautions.no_wait_sirens: Do not wait for official sirens if you feel strong shaking.
precautions.inland_dist: Move at least 2 miles inland or 100 feet above sea level.
precautions.river_mouths: Stay away from coastal inlets and river mouths.
precautions.coastal_zones: Evacuate coastal zones immediately upon warning.
precautions.beach_series: Stay away from the beach; a tsunami is a series of waves.
precautions.wave_height: Listen to local maritime authorities for wave height updates.
precautions.all_clear_return: Do not return to low-lying areas until "All Clear" is given.
precautions.crawl_low: Crawl low under smoke to find fresh air.
precautions.no_elevators: Do not use elevators; use the stairs.
precautions.stop_drop_roll: If your clothes catch fire: Stop, Drop, and Roll.
precautions.fire_spread: IMMEDIATE EVACUATE: Fire is spreading rapidly.
precautions.touch_doors: Touch doors with the back of your hand before opening.
precautions.seal_cracks: If trapped, seal door cracks and signal from a window.
precautions.stay_out: Once out, STAY OUT. Do not go back for any reason.
precautions.prepare_evac: Prepare for potential evacuation; clear exit paths.
precautions.flammable_mats: Move flammable materials away from heat sources.
precautions.smoke_alarms: Test smoke alarms and ensure extinguishers are ready.
precautions.escape_routes: Map out at least two escape routes for every room.
precautions.landslide_prone: Avoid areas prone to landslides like steep slopes.
precautions.unusual_sounds: Stay alert for unusual sounds that might indicate debris flow.
precautions.stream_level: If near a stream, note any changes in water level.
precautions.debris_path: Move quickly away from the path of the landslide.
precautions.seal_all: Stay indoors and seal all windows and doors.
precautions.hvac_off: Turn off air conditioning and ventilation systems.
precautions.industrial_inst: Listen for official instructions regarding shelter or evacuation.
precautions.upwind: If outside, move upwind and away from the source.
precautions.hydrated: Stay hydrated and drink plenty of water.
precautions.hottest_day: Keep out of the sun during the hottest part of the day.
precautions.check_neighbors: Check on neighbors, especially the elderly.
precautions.no_appliances: Stay indoors and avoid using electrical appliances.
precautions.away_windows: Keep away from windows and doors.
precautions.low_lying_area: If outdoors, find shelter in a low-lying area.
precautions.tree_metal: Do not stand under tall trees or near metal objects.
precautions.news_updates: Stay alert and follow local news updates.
precautions.comms_status: Communicate your status to family and friends.
